CustomField.formula: IF( YEAR( DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) ) < 2017, 13.5, IF( AND( DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) >= DATE( 2017,1,1 ), DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) <= DATE( 2017,10,31 ) ), 12.5, IF( AND( DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) >= DATE( 2017,11,1 ), DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) <= DATE( 2017,12,31 )), 12, 12.5 ) ) )
CustomField.label: Comision Referencia RS
